title: grewia geayi
intro: Grewia geayi, also known as the Forest Plum or Plum Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Grewia geayi include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve extracting its bark or leaves to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
